# Onda Corporation
# Hydrophone Calibration Data
#
Calibration_DATE	20-Mar-2026
#
# Hydrophone description
HYD_MFG	Onda
HYD_MODEL	HNA
HYD_APERTURE_NOM_UM	0400
HYD_SN	1393
HYD_POLARITY	Positive
#
# External preamplifier description
AMP_MFG	ONDA
AMP_MODEL	AH-2020-100
AMP_SN	1322
AMP_GAIN_NOM_DB	00
AMP_BW_MHZ	100
AMP_OUTPUT_IMP_NOM_OHMS	50
#
# Cable/adaptor between hydrophone and preamplifier
CA_BWT_HYD_AMP	AR-AMAF
#
# Environment
ELECTRICAL_LOAD	50Ohms
SOFTWARE_VERSION	1.0.8.0
SYSTEM_SETTING	OndaCombineCal.exe
WATER_TEMP_DEGC	23.50
WATER_RESISTIVITY_MOHMS-CM	5.5
#
# Calibration data
# Freq(MHz) Sens(dB re. 1V/uPa) Sens(V/Pa) Sens(V^2cm^2/W)
#
DATA_FIELDS	4
DATA_FIELD	FREQ_MHZ
DATA_FIELD	SENS_DB
DATA_FIELD	SENS_VPERPA
DATA_FIELD	SENS_V2CM2PERW

HEADER_END	0
